description: A candidate who interviewed for a role was not selected to move forward. A recruiter needs to inform them.

nodes.task_description: Identify the candidate and confirm the decision not to move forward.
Update the candidate's status to 'Rejected' in the ATS.

expected_outcome.expected: Recruiter updates the system of record.

nodes.task_description: Send the candidate a standardized rejection email thanking them for their time.

expected_outcome.expected: Recruiter sends a polite and professional rejection notification.
